context: Tests whether the agent uses TypeBox for schema definitions, registers @fastify/type-provider-typebox, defines response schemas on all routes for fast serialization, avoids dynamic schema compilation, and uses @fastify/error for typed custom errors.

checklist.name: TypeBox schema definitions
checklist.description: Uses `@sinclair/typebox` Type.Object() / Type.String() / etc. to define at least the product body and response schemas (not plain JSON Schema literals)

checklist.name: TypeBoxTypeProvider used
checklist.description: Calls `.withTypeProvider<TypeBoxTypeProvider>()` on the Fastify instance (imports TypeBoxTypeProvider from '@fastify/type-provider-typebox')

checklist.name: Response schemas on all routes
checklist.description: Every route definition includes a `schema.response` object (all 5 routes: GET list, POST, GET single, PATCH, DELETE each define at least one response code schema)

checklist.name: Schemas registered at startup
checklist.description: Schemas are defined outside handler functions and added via app.addSchema() or as static TypeBox const values — NOT computed or conditionally generated inside handlers or hooks

checklist.name: Shared schema with $id and $ref
checklist.description: At least one schema uses `$id` and is referenced in route schemas via `{ $ref: '...' }` (reuse via app.addSchema)

checklist.name: additionalProperties: false on input schemas
checklist.description: At least one body or query schema uses `additionalProperties: false` (or TypeBox Type.Object with the options, or strict schema) to prevent extra fields

checklist.name: Pagination query schema
checklist.description: GET /products defines a querystring schema with `page` (integer with minimum 1) and `limit` (integer with maximum bound) fields

checklist.name: @fastify/error used
checklist.description: Uses `createError` from `@fastify/error` to define at least one custom error (e.g., NotFoundError)

checklist.name: TypeScript Static types derived
checklist.description: Uses `Static<typeof Schema>` from `@sinclair/typebox` to derive TypeScript types from schemas

checklist.name: Error response schemas defined
checklist.description: At least one route defines a 404 or 4xx response schema for error responses
